title: Update pre-order button to open Instagram DM directly

requirements.summary: Update the pre-order button in ProductCard.tsx to link directly to Instagram DM using https://ig.me/m/anime_vibe_pk
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the pre-order button on any product card opens https://ig.me/m/anime_vibe_pk in a new tab
The button label remains 'Pre-Order Now → DM on Instagram' or equivalent
The link opens Instagram DM directly rather than the profile page

file_operations.description: Update the pre-order button's href attribute from the Instagram profile URL to https://ig.me/m/anime_vibe_pk to open the DM conversation directly. Ensure the button retains its existing label, styling, target='_blank', and rel='noopener noreferrer' attributes.
